items.body:
Reservation Confirmation

Dates & Details:
Check-in: Mar 07, 2026 at 4:00 PM
Check-out: Mar 12, 2026 at 10:00 AM
Nights: 5
Guests: 4

If anything is incorrect, please let me know ASAP so I can update it before arrival.

Address:
812 Olive Ave, Lake Worth, FL 33460
https://www.google.com/maps/place/26.61512,-80.05781

Parking:
Street parking is available on a first-come basis. Driveway parking is limited to registered vehicles.

WIFI:
Network name: GuestNet
Password: Welcome2026
House Rules:
No smoking or parties/events
Quiet hours: 11:00 PM - 8:00 AM

Hi,

Thanks for booking with us! Your door code is 4002. The code activates at 4 PM on check-in day. Please use the smart lock at the main entrance and message us if you have any trouble.
Hi, just confirming this trip is for a work project near the port. I will need reliable WiFi for calls each evening.
No problem. The desk in the living room has a surge protector and we average 300 Mbps down. Let us know if you need a monitor.
Please send a quick message after you arrive so we can make sure everything is perfect for your stay.
We just arrived—everything looks great and the lock worked fine.
